body:
## Code review

No issues found. Checked for bugs and CLAUDE.md compliance.

**Claude finished @testuser's task in 1m 9s** —— [View job](https://github.com/testowner/testrepo/actions/runs/221)

---
### Review complete

- [x] Gather context (PR diff, prior review rounds, prior fix commits)
- [x] Post review feedback

### Bug still present: gate deletes the drop-in on a failed install

If `install_dropin` fails while the gate is true, the trailing `|| rm -f "$dropin"` still fires — cleanup runs on a failed install, not only on the unmet-gate path.
